news.title: How gold turned $609 billion of imports into a $1.9 trillion stockpile?
news.description: Between 2011 and 2025, India imported $609 billion worth of gold. At today’s prices, that holding is worth $1.9 trillion—making gold one of the greatest household wealth creators in modern India.

news.title: Markets reverse early losses, Sensex climbs 377 points by midday; SBI, Trent lead gains
news.description: Markets rebound from early losses as Sensex rises 377 points, with SBI and Trent leading the gains amid global uncertainty.

news.title: Akshaya Tritiya witnessed buoyant sales across gems & jewellery despite high gold prices
news.description: On April 19, the auspicious occasion drew large crowds at jewellery showrooms nationwide, with estimates indicating significant gold purchases despite a sharp price increase over the past year

news.title: BSE vs IEX vs MCX: Which exchange's shares should you buy now?
news.description: Amidst a market rebound, shares of BSE, MCX, and IEX have surged. Analysts favor MCX and BSE for their strong operating momentum and growth potential in India's deepening capital market participation.
